title: Read, Unread, Star, Tag, Bulk Action, and Conflict Semantics · Language Lens: Feed Go Bulk Transaction Policy
summary: Reading an entry mutates global source state, bulk operations partially apply silently, device updates overwrite each other, tags leak across tenants, and unread counts drift. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go bulk transaction policy increment in consistent personal reader-state model. Learners progress through prediction, expli…
objectives: Define bounded all-or-nothing or per-item bulk semantics, authorization, result reconciliation, and retry behavior.
Make set-state commands idempotent with explicit desired state, preconditions where needed, and stable response semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Predict Feed Go Bulk Transaction Policy · Theory Feed Go Bulk Transaction P…
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go team handles case 2586 during a publisher-fairness incident rehearsal. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove private reader state, desired-state commands, bulk semantics, conflicts, and count repair; browser Go must remain deterministic and free of network, database, process, and host effects; then change one tenant, cursor, reader-state, authorization, cache, or accessibility condition without leaking state. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Feed Go Bulk Transaction Policy contract for the supplied data.

checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The decision applies Feed Go Bulk Transaction Policy to the changed stakeholder case.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
